author: discoursegraphs
description: Add semantic structure to your notes with the Discourse Graph protocol. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Discourse Graphs
manifest.description: Add semantic structure to your notes with the Discourse Graph protocol.
manifest.name: Discourse Graph

name: Discourse Graph

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
# Changelog

## v1.5.0

### Features

- **Send feedback button**: Adds a "Send feedback" button and modal to General Settings so you can report issues (with screenshot, email, title, description, and type) directly from the plugin. ([#1181](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1181))
- **Clearer "Create new Base view" button**: Relabels the create base view button in node type settings to make it clear you're creating a new view, not opening an existing file. ([#1185](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1185))

### Bug Fixes

- **Node tag menu no longer stacks**: Pressing the node-tags hotkey while the menu is already open now dismisses the existing menu instead of stacking a new one on top. ([#1187](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1187))
- **Import modal defaults to unselected**: Candidates in the import / review candidates step now start unselected by default instead of "select all". ([#1120](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1120))
- **Centered Edit node type header**: The Edit node type header is now vertically aligned with the back button in settings. ([#1230](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1230))
releases.name: Discourse Graph v1.5.0

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
### Bug fix

- Manage group leading to the wrong URL [#1102](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/commit/7084762f0fbcf074e9961bd84c69f98102259042)
releases.name: Discourse Graph v1.4.1

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
v1.4.0

### Features

- **Unified create & convert node flows:** Creating or converting content into a discourse node now opens ModifyNodeModal with context pre-filled — from editor selection ([#1003](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1003)), hotkey + inline picker ([#1001](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1001)), right-click “Turn into discourse node” ([#990](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/990)), canvas “Convert to” ([#1002](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1002)), and a new command to convert the active page ([#1089](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1089)).
- **Insert backlink option:** When creating a node, choose whether to insert a backlink at the cursor with smart defaults ([#1018](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1018)).
- **Convert image embeds to nodes:** “Convert to node” on images is easier to discover (click instead of hover) with updated styling ([#991](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/991)).
- **Simpler convert-from-file flow:** File explorer “Convert into” no longer shows the search-as-you-type dropdown ([#1017](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1017)).
- **Import templates from groups:** Node type settings include a flow to import templates shared via your groups ([#1076](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1076)).
- **Template sync with schemas:** Syncing node schemas to Supabase now includes template content for sharing across spaces ([#993](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/993)), with an initial migration for existing templates ([#1090](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1090)).
- **Provenance in discourse context:** Relationship context shows where information came from ([#1030](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1030)).
- **Admin panel: space credentials & groups:** Open the web UI with a space’s credentials ([#1005](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1005)) and see groups you belong to ([#1011](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1011)).
- **Removed “Open node type” command:** Replaced by the updated create/convert flows; docs updated accordingly ([#999](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/999)).

### Bug Fixes
- **Supabase sync recovery:** Obsidian sync recovers correctly after a Concept upsert failure instead of staying stuck ([#1070](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1070)).
- **Link fragments on import:** #heading and block references in markdown links and wikilinks are encoded correctly during import ([#995](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/995)).
- **Node tag hotkey placeholder:** Settings placeholder no longer shows doubled slashes ([#1073](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/1073)).v1.4.0
releases.name: Discourse Graph v1.4.0

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
Changelog
v1.3.0
### Features
- **Stable import folder identification**: Import folders are now matched by spaceUri via a .dg.metadata file instead of vault name, fixing issues with vault renames and name collisions. Existing import folders are migrated automatically on plugin load. ([#970](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/970))

- **Author username on imported nodes**: Adds a username field propagated to the platform account, node frontmatter, discourse context panel, and import modal so imported content shows who published it. ([#981](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/981))

### Bug Fixes
- **Create discourse node backlink behavior**: The "Create discourse node" command only inserts a backlink at the cursor when text is selected, and works correctly when invoked from outside an active editor. ([#986](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/986))
releases.name: Discourse Graph v1.3.0

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
## v1.2.0

### Features

- **Relation creation via drag handles**: Draw discourse relations directly on the canvas by dragging from node handles. Clicking an existing relation arrow lets you update its type in-place. ([#909](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/909))

- **Drag-and-drop wikilinks onto canvas**: Drag wikilinks from reading view or live preview onto the tldraw canvas to create discourse node shapes. Supports both `[[wikilink]]` and `[markdown](link)` formats. ([#960](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/960))

- **Provisional imported relation schemas**: Imported relation types and triplets are now marked as provisional and hidden from all creation UIs until you explicitly accept them in settings. Prevents clutter from unreviewed imports. ([#948](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/948))

- **View-only notice for imported nodes**: The discourse context panel now shows an amber "View only" badge with a tooltip indicating the source space when viewing an imported node. ([#966](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/966))

- **Improved node creation dialog UX**: The content field now appears before the node type selector, auto-focuses on open, and auto-detects the node type when selecting an existing node. ([#976](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/976))

- **Auto-resizing content input with character limit**: The content field in the node creation dialog now grows vertically as you type and enforces Obsidian's 255-character filename limit with an inline error message. ([#977](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/977))

- **Hover tooltip on discourse context panel icon**: The base icon in the discourse context panel now shows an informational tooltip on hover. ([#962](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/962))

### Bug Fixes

- **Command palette accessibility**: The "Create discourse node" command now appears in the command palette even when no markdown file is open. A link to the new note is inserted only when a file is active. ([#979](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/979))
releases.name: Discourse Graph v1.2.0

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
# Changelog

## v1.1.0

### Features

- **Convert image to node via hover icon**: Adds a "Convert to node" hover icon on embedded images in the editor — clicking it opens the node creation modal to turn the image into a discourse node. ([#936](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/936))
- **Create Base view command for node types**: Adds a "Create Base view for node type" command that generates a `.base` YAML file filtered by node type, accessible from the command palette, node type settings, and the discourse context panel. ([#935](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/935))
- **Node menu hotkey on text selection**: When the node tag hotkey is pressed with text selected, an inline node type picker appears — selecting a type creates a discourse node from the selected text and replaces it with a `[[wiki-link]]`. ([#917](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/917))
- **Separate tentative (imported) relations in UI**: The relationship section now splits into "Current Relationships" (local/accepted) and "Tentative Relationships" (imported, not yet accepted), with per-entry accept buttons on tentative entries. ([#941](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/941))
- **Auto-save plugin settings**: Settings now auto-save to match Obsidian's native behavior — removes the "Save Changes" button from all settings tabs; discrete inputs save immediately, text inputs save on blur. ([#913](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/913))

### Bug Fixes

- **Fix relations.json scattered across multiple locations**: `relations.json` is now always stored at the vault root; on every load, scattered files are found, merged, and consolidated automatically. ([#947](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/947))
- **Re-scan unpublished relations at load or sync**: Unpublished relations are now re-scanned when the plugin loads or syncs, preventing relations from being silently missed. ([#918](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/918))
releases.name: Discourse Graph v1.1.0

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
## v0.5.5

### Features

- **Instant canvas view**: Canvas now opens as TldrawView immediately after creation instead of requiring an extra step ([#892](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/892))
- **Node type folder locations**: Configure a dedicated folder location per node type so new nodes are automatically saved in the right place ([#877](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/877))
- **Import relations with nodes**: When importing a node, its relations are now imported along with it ([#847](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/847))
- **Feedback for oversize assets**: The plugin now surfaces a warning when an asset exceeds the size limit during publishing ([#882](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/882))

### Bug Fixes

- **Color circle for new node types**: Fixed missing color indicator in node type settings for newly created node types ([#887](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/887))
- **Wikilink handling on import**: Fixed wikilink generation when importing nodes ([#807](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/807))

### Internal

- **Plugin store compliance** (Parts 2 & 3): Ongoing cleanup and prep work for Obsidian plugin store submission ([#849](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/849), [#850](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/850))
releases.name: Discourse Graph v0.5.5

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
# Changelog

## v0.5.4

### Features

- **Export relations to imported nodes**: Relations to imported nodes are now included when publishing, resolving identifiers to the original node in the shared group ([#817](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/817))
- **Separate imported vs local types in settings**: Imported node and relationship types are now visually distinguished from locally-created types in the settings panel ([#857](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/857))
- **Custom hotkey for node tag menu**: The input field for choosing a custom hotkey for the node tag menu is now accessible in settings ([#855](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/855))

### Bug Fixes

- **Command palette sync notice**: Fixed "Sync mode is not enabled" notice appearing when opening the command palette instead of only when executing sync commands ([#864](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/864))
- **Canvas relations menu**: Fixed bug when inserting a node via the relations menu on the tldraw canvas ([#863](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/863))

### Internal

- **Plugin store prep**: Updated manifest description, removed default hotkey assignment, and cleaned up settings heading for Obsidian plugin store compliance ([#848](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/848))
- **Updated README**: Revised plugin README with updated instructions and promo images ([#846](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/846))
releases.name: Discourse Graph v0.5.4

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
# Changelog

## v0.5.3

### Features

- **Drag and drop into canvas**: Drag links from Base and the File Explorer directly into the Discourse Graph canvas ([#780](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/780))
- **Publish relations**: Relations are now published alongside nodes when publishing to a group ([#827](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/827))

### Bug Fixes

- **Reverse relationships**: Fixed reverse relationships not being created properly in the discourse context panel ([#833](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/833))

### Internal

- **Database views**: Migrated sync and import queries to use database views instead of direct table access ([#831](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/831))
releases.name: Discourse Graph v0.5.3

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
## Changes in this release:
- Auto detect relations when creating discourse node. Now if you create a new Discourse Node from another node that it has a relation to, you can also link the new node to the existing node at the moment of creation
- Relations are now stored in `relations.json` instead of in frontmatter
- Beta feature: Sync Discourse Nodes between different vault
releases.name: v0.5.0

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
Changes in this release

### Bug fixes:
- Fixed [Error "Folder already exists" when create new canvas](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/601)
- [Fix show Ids setting not working](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/603)
- [Fix styling for tldraw buttons in tldraw obsidian](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/604)
- [Preserve list indicators in node tag flow](https://github.com/DiscourseGraphs/discourse-graph/pull/619)
releases.name: Discourse Graph v0.4.1

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
Changes in the last release:
- New features:
   + [Discourse Canvas]: Open node to new leaf using Cmd + Alt + Enter (similar to native Obsidian behavior)
   + [Discourse Canvas]: New create node modal: You can now search and insert existing discourse nodes with the same create node modal
   + Ability to delete relations from Discourse Context Panel
- Bug fixes:
   + Right click is now available on tldraw canvas
   + Fix the bug to create a new relation type
releases.name: Discourse Graph v0.4.0

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
Changes in this release:

Feature:
- Create node tag via hot key
- Added documentation on the website

Bug fix:
- Make sure users can't move the entire relation arrow when dragging the Discourse Relation arrow
releases.name: Discourse Graph v0.3.1

releases.author: trangdoan982
releases.description:
Changes in this release:

**New features**
- Key figure
- Open Discourse Nodes on the side bar or to the new tab
- Convert text and image into a discourse node 

**Bug fixes**
- Fix default node tags with extra `#` character
- Fix tooltip position for node tag when tag is at end of line
releases.name: Discourse Graph v0.3.0
